691 N0450B_DOSE_RDCTN_SW N0450B_DOSE_RDCTN_SW N0450B Gradual Dose Reduction CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether a gradual dose reduction (GDR) of the antipsychotic medication has

1=Yes
^=Blank (Skip Pattern) effective 10/01/2017
